subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto that which the Beauty of Manifestation singeth forth upon this Mount and in this blessed spot which hath been raised above [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسمعی ما یغن جمال الظهور فی هذا الطور علی هذه البقعه المبارکه التی ارتفعت عن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @suffering and imprisonment, @Primal Will and the Word; Remembrance; Manifestation of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
